name: che-apple-mail-mcp
description: Shell v2.33.0 (shell-only, binary stays v2.19.0) — archive-mail Step 8.5 manifest-driven reconcile + atomic index write (plugins#110, stacked on plugins#107): the end-of-run Index Reconcile Gate gains a Phase 0 that mechanically fills the current run's batch writes from the in-memory export manifest — file from written_path, key from the manifest message_id, date + thread_key from the written md frontmatter, subject from the Step 4.5 preview (frontmatter carries no subject; the preview is the only clean source, falling back to the body Subject: line only if the preview slice was not retained) — so those entries are built with zero heuristic subject-from-body (a correction of the issue's premise: the #107 verify established the manifest carries message_id + written_path but NOT date/subject/thread_key, so reconcile is a three-source merge, not a pure manifest consume). Phase 1 keeps the full output_dir scan for historical orphans (a prior interrupted run's manifest is gone; non-batch or externally-placed md), which still reconstruct from disk frontmatter + the Subject-line heuristic. Both the Step 6 index update and the Step 8.5 gate now write ${INDEX_FILE} via temp+rename (os.replace), a durable fix for the single-file partial-write corruption mode that is complementary to the gate's cross-file orphan coverage (mail#261's deferred durable-fix note). Shell v2.32.0 (shell-only, binary stays v2.19.0) — archive-mail Step 5 batch-export migration (plugins#107, che-apple-mail-mcp#232 SOP-side landing): Step 5 gains a server-side batch-export primary path (Step 5.0) that replaces per-email get_email(format='text') + client-side transcription with batch_export_emails_markdown for archive lists ≥5 (per-email loop stays as Step 5.1 fallback for <5, enriched template, or batch failure). The tool's frozen frontmatter shares the same 6 core field names/order as the SOP simple template (message_id/thread_key/in_reply_to/date/sender/direction), refuting the original proposal's point-4 premise that thread_key/direction are client-side value-adds; a 6-AI re-verify then caught that it is NOT byte-for-byte (the tool strips a superset of reply prefixes for thread_key, lowercases sender, preserves the date offset, and appends a body_type field), so the SOP's per-email fallback rules were aligned to the binary to keep the two write paths from fragmenting threads.json. Mixed corpora split into two batch calls by direction — but partitioned by each id's OWN mailbox (Batch B = ids whose mailbox matchesSpecial(Sent); Batch A = the rest), NOT by recipe provenance (3b/3c subject sweeps carry the user's own sent mail, which the naive split mislabeled received), with Batch B passing a literal "Sent" label (the tool's direction heuristic is a substring match that a localized Sent name would miss); opts.filenames is passed per-id computed by the SOP's own filename rule to preserve the 50-archive naming convention (the tool's default slug strips Re:/collapses dashes, which would drift) but is only a REQUESTED name — the tool seeds its collision guard from on-disk .md and uniquifies every branch, so the authoritative stem/path is always the manifest item's written_path; attachments stay on client-side Step 5.5 (richer keyword classify + inline cid + cross-reference, not the tool's extension-only routing) so batch runs without include_attachments; the per-call manifest (items carry id/status/attachments always, message_id/written_path only for non-error items, and NO date/subject/thread_key) is retained for the plugins#110 Step 8.5 reconcile work stacked on this PR — Step 8.5 itself is unchanged here. Shell v2.31.0 (shell-only, binary stays v2.19.0) — archive-mail Step 8b audit-denominator hardening (plugins#112, follow-up to plugins#109): the thread-completeness audit now fetches its total-count denominator via search_emails projection:summary + dedup:logical (collapsing a message's multi-mailbox Gmail copies server-side, grouped by subject+sender+date_received as a conservative Message-ID approximation — not exact per-Message-ID like the numerator) and then applies the same Step 3 mailbox drop-set (Drafts/Trash/exclude_mailboxes), so a Gmail thread carrying a draft or dual-stored INBOX/All-Mail rows stops over-counting into a phantom 'missing siblings' warning; when the match set exceeds the query limit the audit emits a truncation caveat and skips the comparison rather than falsely reporting complete. Shell v2.30.0 (shell-only, binary stays v2.19.0) — archive-mail Step 3 search mechanization (plugins#109, follow-up to che-apple-mail-mcp#261): sent-mail detection becomes a scoped search_emails call (mailbox: <per-account Sent real name> + field: recipient) with a documented Tier-2 unscoped+post-filter fallback for mailbox-URL encoding mismatches; received/subject searches gain a mandatory Drafts/Trash post-filter on the result mailbox field (real names via get_special_mailboxes + exclude_mailboxes config) — the All-Mail superset discipline is now mechanically actionable instead of prose. Shell v2.29.0 (shell-only, binary stays v2.19.0) — archive-mail SOP hardening (che-apple-mail-mcp#261): mandatory end-of-run Index Reconcile Gate (orphan md → repaired index entries, last_updated = max(date), unparseable surfaced, run cannot succeed silently) + All-Mail superset trap discipline (sent-mail detection via the Sent mailbox, drafts excluded from the corpus, Message-ID dedup). Shell v2.28.0 ships binary v2.19.0 — 10-issue release: reply/forward send-stage POSTDISPATCH protection + MailController test seams closing the disclosure family-swap blind spot (#254); opt-in require_wrapper_free on compose_email/create_draft — clean failure with named reason + alternatives instead of a silently wrapped draft, strict POSTDISPATCH mapped to do-not-retry guidance (#239); non-ASCII attachment paths route to the legacy native-attach path instead of hanging the GUI go-to-folder sheet (#220); attachment savable:false false-negatives fixed via a name-free part-id-directory probe rescuing Mail's degraded on-disk filenames, hardened against .DS_Store and symlinks (#183); not-downloaded attachments now say so — savable_reason field + an actionable open-the-message error replacing the generic not-found/-10000 (#238); per-account inbox resolution in get_special_mailboxes, deferral lifted by a 7/7-account live check incl. a localized Exchange 收件匣 (#249); doc-count census with guard tests pinning every README/manifest claim to defineTools() (#248); export frontmatter dates preserve the original Date-header UTC offset with RFC 2822 trailing-comment tolerance (#244); the compose disclosure wiring gains a runnable regression lock via a pure router (#241); mailto send-stage failures refuse the legacy re-send — duplicate-outbound protection with a _dispatched success-path flag (#242). 6-AI verify per PR; suite 882, 0 failures. Shell v2.27.0 ships binary v2.18.0 — 14-issue release: `batch_export_emails_markdown` becomes the bulk-export tool's canonical name with `export_emails_markdown` as a zero-break deprecated alias (stderr warn, not removed before v3.0; #233 — fixes the #232 name-level discoverability incident); compose/create_draft (#237) and reply/forward (#229) no longer degrade silently to the wrapped-body legacy path (3 disclosure layers: result-string suffix + stderr warn + schema eligibility text); concurrent same-dir exports serialized via advisory flock fail-fast (#236); wrapper-free reply/forward clean path via native verb + cursor paste (#218); AppleScript search fallback honors field/date filters (#194); export output-path home-relative denylist + opt-in strict allowlist (#197) and symlink-swap TOCTOU race-free writes (#200); get_account_info/list_mailboxes account_id escape hatch + no more silent all-mailbox fallback (#202); deterministic search tie-ordering (#209); in_reply_to (#198) + body_type (#199) frontmatter; dedup-aware archive primitives — skip_message_ids_path + summary projection + batch message_id (#177); whose-content-contains O(corpus) scan guard (#221). 6-AI verify per PR; suite 815, 0 failures. Shell v2.26.0 ships binary v2.16.0 — Developer ID signing + notarization 讓 Full Disk Access grant 跨 version bump 不失效 (#211);FDA-denied 訊息改指 responsible process（終端機 / Claude Desktop）而非 binary 自己 (#214，libquarantine SPI 經驗證對 terminal/CLI-launched process 回 self、無法 in-process 解析確切 app，故只列候選不臆測);新增 Full Disk Access onboarding：`CheAppleMailMCP --setup` SwiftUI 設定視窗（live FDA 狀態 + on-demand Automation 檢查 + open-settings/copy-path 按鈕，授權後即時翻 Ready）、`--check-fda` headless、`check_fda` MCP tool，全 gated 在 flag 後不動 stdio path (#213);6-AI ensemble verify 兩輪、29 findings 全處理;test suite 677、0 failures。Shell v2.25.0 ships binary v2.15.0 — #208 `search_emails` gains `projection` (full/ids/count) + `dedup` (none/logical): `projection=ids` returns rowId-strings-only (no per-row recipient fetch, ~10–30× smaller payload, #204 truncation preserved); `projection=count` returns the total match count; `dedup=logical` collapses Gmail mailbox-duplicate rows server-side via GROUP BY (subject,sender,date_received). Omitting both is byte-identical to the existing full envelope. Spec-driven (search-id-projection). 659 tests/0 fail; follow-up #209. Shell v2.24.0 ships binary v2.14.0 — `search_emails` / `list_emails` truncation envelope (#204): these tools applied a SQL `LIMIT` and returned a bare array with no truncation signal, so bulk consumers (notably `export_emails_markdown` #193 archive) silently missed emails when a sender exceeded `limit`. Now both return an envelope `{results, returned, limit, truncated}` — the SQLite fast path fetches `limit+1` for a definitive `truncated`; the AppleScript fallback uses a documented best-effort `== limit` heuristic. A 6-AI idd-verify ensemble caught + fixed a CRITICAL negative-limit crash (`Array(prefix(-1))` trap) before merge via a `limit` clamp; suite 640, 0 failures. Breaking response-shape change (bare array → `.results`); consumer/doc update tracked in #205. Shell v2.23.0 ships binary v2.13.0 — new `export_emails_markdown` server-side bulk email→markdown export (#193): one call fetches a batch, renders verbatim markdown (frozen 6-field frontmatter) + optional attachments, returns a per-email manifest with partial-failure semantics — designed to take verbatim transcription off the LLM path for large archive jobs; a 6-AI idd-verify ensemble (5 Claude reviewers + cross-model Codex) caught two CRITICAL pre-merge arbitrary-write paths (sender-controlled attachment-name + per-id override traversal), fixed via shared leaf-path containment before merge. Also `get_special_mailboxes` per-account real-name resolution (#179) and `check_for_new_mail`/`synchronize_account` `account_id` escape hatch (#191); 6-AI ensemble verified; suite 624, 0 failures. Shell v2.22.0 ships binary v2.12.0 — AppleScript-fallback account-resolution completeness sweep: the email→UUID `account_id` chokepoint now covers BOTH the AppleScript-routed write tools (#176, 14 handlers) AND the read-tool AppleScript fallbacks (#180 — 11 legacy `mailboxRef`/`msgRef` sites routed through the chokepoint, `account_id` threaded through all 10 read tools), so a `search_emails` `account_id` re-feeds into any tool without a structural `-1728` on Gmail / ambiguous-display_name accounts; `save_attachment` `mkdir -p`s a missing `save_path` parent instead of mistranslating it as an IMAP-cache `-10000` (#178); `MailSQLiteTests` skip cleanly (not 42 spurious failures) without Full Disk Access (#182); 6-AI ensemble verified. Apple Mail MCP server — 51 tools, reply-as-draft + IDD task enforcement + NSQL confirmation + .claude/.mail/ namespace + Layer 2 post-fetch corpus refinement (shell v2.33.0, binary v2.19.0)。Shell v2.20.1 ships binary v2.10.0 — 11-issue marathon closes #126, #128, #129, #130, #131, #133, #134, #135, #137, #138, #139: new feature `from_address` for compose_email/create_draft multi-account sender (#131); `redirect_email` boundary recipient validation (#133, #41 consistency); reply/forward + mailbox-CRUD actor wiring regression-lock (#134 + #139, closes #104 PR-A/B/C/D verify DA gaps); RedirectEmailScriptBuilder escape coverage + byte-identity golden (#135); resolveMailboxRef/mailboxRefByAccountId compose resolveAccountRef (#137, #110 sibling DRY); RFC 2047/2231 attachment-filename hardening sweep across CJK + Yahoo/Outlook 16 + path-traversal vectors (#115/#122/#124/#125/#126); cross-account move/copy README limitation (#129); positional UUID/verb-anchor assertion hardening (#128/#130); Codex layer migration deferred (#138, not recurrent); test suite 475 → 482+;full 6-AI ensemble verify every PR。Shell v2.20.0 adds six opt-in corpus-refinement config fields to `/archive-mail` (`sender_includes` / `sender_excludes` / `recipient_includes` / `recipient_excludes` / `subject_includes` / `subject_excludes`) — Layer 2 post-fetch thread-coherent refinement distinct from Layer 1 search-time `filters`; case-insensitive substring with bare-value normalization; excludes-precedence on same axis; per-thread coherence; new spec `archive-mail-corpus-refinement`; closes #76 + #84。Shell v2.19.7 ships binary v2.9.0 (#99 RFC 2047 nested decode for list_attachments — Outlook 16 Chinese filenames; #101 save_attachment account_id disambiguation for multi-account-same-display_name; #104 PR-A: 5 mutation tools mark_read/flag_email/set_flag_color/set_background_color/mark_as_junk gain account_id; #106 EnvelopeIndexReader reverse-lookup cache + accountUUIDs primitive)。疊加 Shell v2.19.6 (#73): hooks/session-start.sh compare 改 prefer `.binary_version` (post-#77 schema),fallback `.version`,杜絕每次 session start spurious SIGTERM(runtime tag vs shell version 永遠 mismatch trap)。疊加 Shell v2.19.5 ships binary v2.8.5 (#16 nested markdown lists with depth-aware <ul>/<ol>, #17 markdown tables with <table>/<thead>/<tbody> + per-column alignment, #22 markdown hardening Item D code-fence language + spec docs, #26 malformed multipart throws emlxParseFailed for handler fallback, #28 crossValidateAttachments helper + 6 filter tests, #89 list_emails SQLite do/catch + AppleScript 3x IPC reduction)。疊加 v2.18.1 (#71 get_email_metadata SQLite fallback parity + cluster #61-64 attachmentFragment hardening);v2.18.0 (#76) Staleness Detection — wrapper writes runtime state file on spawn (pid/started_at/version_at_spawn);新增 hooks/session-start.sh,session 啟動時偵測 plugin.json 與 in-memory binary 版本 drift,SIGTERM(+5s grace,SIGKILL fallback)stale PID 讓 Claude Code 重 spawn 取新 binary,徹底解決「plugin update 後當下 session 仍跑舊 binary」silent staleness 問題。疊加 v2.17.0 (#49) Workspace Layout Detection;v2.16.1 ship 鏈到 binary v2.7.1 (#72 base64 fix + #69 SQLite fast-path stderr logging + #66 .partial.emlx attachment fix);v2.16.0 config schema .md → .yaml (#47);v2.15.0 inline cid: 圖片保留 (#45);v2.14.0 dedup_strategy opt-in (#18);v2.13.0 markdown template 簡化 (#17);v2.12.0 zero-arg mode (#13/#21);v2.11.0 binary v2.7.0 multi-attachment race fix (#60);v2.6.0 marathon (8 PRs);v2.9.0 task enforcement;v2.8.0 namespace;v2.7.0 NSQL confirmation。
